title: Plan a plant establishment program
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Plan a plant establishment program demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Carry out preliminary planning activities for plant establishment program

pcs.text: Consult with client to establish preferences and requirements for plant establishment program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Consult with client to establish preferences and requirements for plant establishment program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Consult with client to establish preferences and requirements for plant establishment program.

pcs.text: Research plant species and cultivars, local by-laws and restrictions that may affect the plant establishment program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Research plant species and cultivars, local by-laws and restrictions that may affect the plant establishment program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Research plant species and cultivars, local by-laws and restrictions that may affect the plant establishment program.

pcs.text: Identify environmental implications of planned program and, if necessary, report to relevant personnel for further research
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify environmental implications of planned program and, if necessary, report to relevant personnel for further research?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify environmental implications of planned program and, if necessary, report to relevant personnel for further research.

pcs.text: Develop a concept plan that reflects client preferences and requirements and takes into account site factors and identified requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop a concept plan that reflects client preferences and requirements and takes into account site factors and identified requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop a concept plan that reflects client preferences and requirements and takes into account site factors and identified requirements.

pcs.text: Present concept plan to client for discussion and approval
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Present concept plan to client for discussion and approval?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Present concept plan to client for discussion and approval.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Carry out preliminary planning activities for plant establishment program

elements.title: Determine requirements of plant establishment program

pcs.text: Identify plant species and cultivars appropriate to site and consistent with agreed concept plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify plant species and cultivars appropriate to site and consistent with agreed concept plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify plant species and cultivars appropriate to site and consistent with agreed concept plan.

pcs.text: Calculate and cost required quantity and confirm availability with suppliers
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Calculate and cost required quantity and confirm availability with suppliers?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Calculate and cost required quantity and confirm availability with suppliers.

pcs.text: Determine plant establishment procedures that suit the characteristics of available plant materials, resources and equipment available and environmental factors that would affect the success of the plant establishment program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine plant establishment procedures that suit the characteristics of available plant materials, resources and equipment available and environmental factors that would affect the success of the plant establishment program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine plant establishment procedures that suit the characteristics of available plant materials, resources and equipment available and environmental factors that would affect the success of the plant establishment program.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify post-planting care requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify post-planting care requirements.

pcs.text: Identify and cost resources, tools, equipment and machinery required for planting and post-planting care and confirm availability with suppliers, contractors and appropriate personnel
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and cost resources, tools, equipment and machinery required for planting and post-planting care and confirm availability with suppliers, contractors and appropriate personnel?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and cost resources, tools, equipment and machinery required for planting and post-planting care and confirm availability with suppliers, contractors and appropriate personnel.

pcs.text: Identify hazards and assess risks in workplace, and implement control measures to manage risks according to workplace health and safety procedures, estimate costs and document in plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify hazards and assess risks in workplace, and implement control measures to manage risks according to workplace health and safety procedures, estimate costs and document in plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards and assess risks in workplace, and implement control measures to manage risks according to workplace health and safety procedures, estimate costs and document in plan.

pcs.text: Outline staged implementation and development, where appropriate, and provide access for future works provided
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Outline staged implementation and development, where appropriate, and provide access for future works provided?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Outline staged implementation and development, where appropriate, and provide access for future works provided.

pcs.text: Determine timelines for preparations, planting and post-planting care, taking into account needs of plant species and cultivars, site conditions, and any other planning requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine timelines for preparations, planting and post-planting care, taking into account needs of plant species and cultivars, site conditions, and any other planning requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine timelines for preparations, planting and post-planting care, taking into account needs of plant species and cultivars, site conditions, and any other planning requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Determine requirements of plant establishment program

elements.title: Prepare and document plant establishment program and specification

pcs.text: Produce a scaled site plan which can be readily interpreted and understood by on-site personnel
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Produce a scaled site plan which can be readily interpreted and understood by on-site personnel?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Produce a scaled site plan which can be readily interpreted and understood by on-site personnel.

pcs.text: Develop and document detailed on-site procedures and schedules required for planting of site and post-planting care of plants
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop and document detailed on-site procedures and schedules required for planting of site and post-planting care of plants?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop and document detailed on-site procedures and schedules required for planting of site and post-planting care of plants.

pcs.text: Prepare detailed plan, specifications and quotation based on requirements of the program, and present to client for acceptance
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare detailed plan, specifications and quotation based on requirements of the program, and present to client for acceptance?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare detailed plan, specifications and quotation based on requirements of the program, and present to client for acceptance.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Prepare and document plant establishment program and specification
